display_title: Slay the Spire 2:The Lost Wisp
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Lost Wisp.png}} {{E|The Lost Wisp|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Capture the Wisp}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Decay||2}} (curse) to Deck.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain the {{R|Lost Wisp||2}} (relic).}}
{{Frame|Search the Nearby Area}} {{TS|positive||Gain 45-75 Gold.}} == Dialogue ==
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of {{TS|red|up|deceased insects}}, surrounding what looks to be a {{TS|orange||small glowing mote}} . It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames! You move closer to investigate.
{{Frame|Capture the Wisp}}
You approach the {{TS|orange||Wisp}} cautiously... The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence. When in arm's reach, you grasp the {{TS|orange||Wisp}} but it {{TS|red|shake|scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame!}} Still, you {{TS||shake|fumble}} and wrestle the creature into submission. Eventually, the {{TS|orange||Wisp}} concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.
{{Frame|Search the Nearby Area}}
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe! Not much is in the area, but you find some gold scattered amongst the dead bugs. You don't seek an answer.
